title: Build Claude analysis engine for booth demo sessions
description: Send the correlated timeline to Claude API (via RONE AI endpoint) for analysis. Claude should determine: (1) which products/features were shown, (2) what the visitor asked about or showed interest in, (3) key moments worth highlighting, (4) recommended follow-up actions for the SDR. Use recording-analyzer engine pattern (modular, template-based). Output summary.json matching DATA-CONTRACT.md schema.
tests: Feed sample timeline -> summary.json has all required fields
Products shown list is accurate (not hallucinated)
Visitor interests have evidence field referencing actual transcript/click
Analysis completes within 60 seconds for a 15-minute demo
